brief.title: Brian's Calendar Quick Questions
brief.description: Multiple choice quick question brief for Brian to identify which projects need to be on the calendar, when they should be scheduled, and review the current status of all agent tasks.

questions.text: Which projects need to be added to the calendar this week?

followUp.prompt: Please describe the project to add:

questions.text: When should the selected projects be scheduled?
questions.note: This question repeats for each project selected in Q1.

followUp.prompt: Please provide the target date or date range:

questions.text: What time of day works best for these calendar items?
What priority level should these calendar items have?

options.label: A
options.text: Critical - Must happen on this date

options.label: B
options.text: High - Should happen around this time

options.label: C
options.text: Medium - Sometime in the window is fine

questions.text: Are there any projects that should be removed or rescheduled from the current calendar?

options.label: D
options.text: Yes - Both remove and reschedule items (please specify)

followUp.prompt: Please describe what needs to be changed:

agentTaskStatuses.description: Current status of tasks across all working agents. This section is presented to Brian for review during the briefing so he can assess progress and priorities.

tasks.title: Nightly calendar setup for next day
tasks.description: Reviews all messages, emails, and chats to prepare next day's calendar.

tasks.title: Morning check-in for schedule changes
tasks.description: Checks for fires or urgent changes that need to be addressed in the morning.

tasks.title: Review and categorize incoming emails
tasks.description: Processes incoming emails and flags items requiring follow-up.

tasks.title: Client follow-up tracking
tasks.description: Ensures all client communications from the week are followed up on.

tasks.title: Monitor project milestones and deadlines
tasks.description: Tracks all active project milestones and alerts on upcoming deadlines.

tasks.title: Generate weekly project status report
tasks.description: Compiles status updates from all projects into a summary report.

tasks.title: Track client onboarding progress
tasks.description: Monitors onboarding steps for new clients and flags overdue items.

tasks.title: Schedule client check-in calls
tasks.description: Identifies clients due for check-ins and prepares scheduling options.

tasks.title: Monitor for urgent issues and escalations
tasks.description: Watches for critical issues that need immediate attention and routes them appropriately.

tasks.title: Coordinate agent response to fires
tasks.description: When urgent issues arise, coordinates other agents to help address them.

statusDefinitions.active: Agent is currently running this task on a recurring basis.
statusDefinitions.in-progress: Task is actively being worked on right now.
statusDefinitions.pending: Task is queued and will be started soon.
statusDefinitions.idle: Task is on standby, waiting to be triggered.
statusDefinitions.blocked: Task cannot proceed due to a dependency or issue.
